acquisition method: the applied data dependent acquisition (DDA) MS scheme
alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide is routinely included in the MAE elution buffer
alkylation concentration: MAE buffer consisted of ... 25 mM iodoacetamide adjusted to pH 3.3
collision energy: We applied a normalized collision energy of 35% and an activation time of 30 ms for CID
enrichment method: MHC class I peptide ligands are typically isolated by MHC immunoaffinity chromatography (MHC-IAC)
instrument: measured with EThcD at the Orbitrap Fusion
